SOURCE: 12045067.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (12045067.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT specialist with over a decade of experience in managing and implementing complex data networks, telecommunications systems, and IT infrastructure projects. Skilled in project management, engineering support, and system integration.
SKILLS: Project Management, Engineering Support, System Integration, Telecommunications Systems, Data Networks, IT Infrastructure, Technical Oversight, Financial Planning and Tracking, Contract Engineering Services, Acquisition Documentation Development

SOURCE: 12045067.pdf
JOB TITLE: Project Manager
COMPANY: US Army Information Systems Engineering Command (USAISEC)
DATES: 2019-2023
DESCRIPTION: Managed the new C4 facility for JSOC at Ft Bragg, NC. Coordinated daily project activities and ensured IT infrastructure installation met technical specifications.

SOURCE: 12045067.pdf
JOB TITLE: Project Coordinator
COMPANY: US Army Information Systems Engineering Command (USAISEC)
DATES: 2019-2023
DESCRIPTION: Led the ARCENT relocation project. Identified and analyzed requirements, assigned tasks to IPT, and provided technical oversight.

SOURCE: 12045067.pdf
JOB TITLE: Systems Integration Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name 1/4
DATES: 2009-2019
DESCRIPTION: Developed FDC, SDPs, and other acquisition documentation for complex IT projects. Provided engineering support for C2 facility upgrades and USARC BRAC relocation.

SOURCE: 12045067.pdf
JOB TITLE: Communications Engineer
COMPANY: U.S. Army Information Systems Engineering Command (USAISEC)
DATES: 2001-2009
DESCRIPTION: Provided IT engineering services for C2 facilities and supported USARSO and IMA projects at Fort Sam Houston, Texas.
